hooks.command: [ -f .hedwig-cg/knowledge.db ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"hedwig-cg: Code graph available. Use `hedwig-cg --json search \"<query>\"` (5-signal HybridRAG) instead of grepping raw files. This single command covers vector, graph, keyword, and community search with RRF fusion."}}' || true
